title: leadv2 Scorecard Row
description: Closed-vocab numeric JSONL row appended to docs/leadv2/scorecard.jsonl at Phase 8 Close. task_id is always a VALUE, never a key. additionalProperties:false enforces closed vocab and prevents free-text key drift.

task_id.description: Opaque task identifier (e.g. PO-042). Always a value — never used as a JSON key.

repo.description: Basename of LEADV2_PROJECT_ROOT (e.g. persona-engine, m3-market, respiro-ios). Prevents signal mixing across repos.

arm.description: A/B arm assignment written to context.yaml at task-init by leadv2-shadow-apply.sh --assign. Null when shadow A/B is not active.

verify_pass.description: 1 if verify phase passed (all assertions green), 0 otherwise.

post_deploy_regression.description: 1 if a regression was detected by outcome-watch after deploy, 0 if stable. May be backfilled via patch record by leadv2-outcome-watch.sh --sweep.

cost_actual_usd.description: Actual total cost in USD from costs.yaml sum. Null when costs.yaml is absent or empty (missing vs zero are distinguishable). Must be >= 0 when not null.

cost_estimate_usd.description: Estimated cost in USD from context.yaml cost_estimate.usd, written at Plan phase. Null if no estimate was provided.

error_usd.description: Cost forecast error: cost_actual_usd - cost_estimate_usd. Null when cost_estimate_usd is null. Negative = under budget, positive = over budget.

founder_interventions_count.description: Count of founder interventions sourced only from machine-readable events: ask-lead.sh REVISE log entries and context.yaml decision_override field. Free-text parsing is banned per D9. Omit field (set 0) when no machine-readable source exists.

shadow_arm.description: Shadow A/B arm derived from hash(task_id)%2 at scorecard-write time. Provides the join key between 'task was in arm A/B' and its score. Null when shadow is not active.

closed_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of Phase 8 Close completion.

nested_spawns.description: Count of allow-verdict lines in the task's nested-spawns.log. 0 when log absent. Optional field.

escalations_used.description: Value of `used` from the task's escalation-budget.yaml at close time. 0 when budget file absent. Optional field.
